narrative: A Recommendation Systems Engineer at Zoho with seven years of product‑focused experience, he brings solid depth in search‑related technologies. His strongest ranking factor is an above‑average match to the JD‑relevant skill set, highlighted by hands‑on work with LoRA, Elasticsearch/OpenSearch, BM25 and Learning‑to‑Rank pipelines that align directly with the senior AI/ML search and retrieval focus. He also demonstrates proven expertise in scikit‑learn for ranking models, fitting the 5‑9 year experience band. While his profile is credible, the unknown notice period and current base in Indore reduce immediate availability for the Pune/Noida location.
